best_unix_strategy:
awk '/^## Quick Start Guide/{start=1; next} /^## System Dependencies/{end=1; next} start && end {print "
"} start && !end {print} end && start {start=0; print "
"}' input.md > temp.md && awk '/^## Quick Start Guide/{print "
"} /^## System Dependencies/{print "
"}' temp.md > output.md
rationale: Moving a section header and all its content while preserving internal structure requires understanding hierarchical boundaries (AST). Standard line-based tools like sed/awk struggle to define the exact end of a 'Quick Start Guide' block without knowing the subsequent section markers.
